anti_claim: This Batch-8 compliance pipeline capsule accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies, bounded public exercises, and stable negative-case codes only. It is not a full compliance-ledger refresh, not observe dispatch authority, not raw-seed mutation authority, not provider dispatch, not publication approval, and not release approval.

allowed_public_inputs: public engine ids and source-module ids
public negative-case ids and stable error codes
exact copied non-secret compliance and pipeline source modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Fixture-only receipts, prose-only compliance claims, full compliance-ledger freshness claims, observe dispatch, raw-seed mutation, provider dispatch, publication approval, or release approval that does not copy source bodies, execute bounded behavior, preserve anti-claims, and block private/live-state export.
failure_modes: engine count drifts from the six Batch-8 compliance and pipeline exercises
source module count drifts from eleven without manifest and test updates
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required compliance or pipeline anchors
bounded compliance check mutates the ledger or claims full freshness authority
baseline companion scanner stops identifying parseable standards as baseline-only rows
pipeline helper exercises stop preserving directive, selection, compile, dispatch, or receipt-boundary semantics
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, private artifacts, provider/browser state, credentials, or private runtime state
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe composite organ that imports compliance adapters, compliance-ledger builder code, and observe pipeline stages as exact copied macro source bodies plus bounded public exercises.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun compliance coverage, baseline scanner, and observe-pipeline boundary mechanics without confusing source-open executable evidence with full compliance freshness, raw-seed mutation, provider dispatch, publication, or release authority.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly six Batch-8 compliance and pipeline engine exercises
require exactly eleven copied macro source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
execute bounded compliance and pipeline behavior against public synthetic payloads
require stable negative-case codes for all six failure classes
keep provider dispatch, observe dispatch authority, raw-seed mutation, source mutation, publication, and release authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 8 Compliance Pipeline capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 8 Compliance Pipeline capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch8_compliance_pipeline_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: This Batch-8 compliance pipeline capsule accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies, bounded public exercises, and stable negative-case codes only. It is not a full compliance-ledger refresh, not observe dispatch authority, not raw-seed mutation authority, not provider dispatch, not publication approval, and not release approval.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, and public_private_boundary.
